title: Freedom Summer
query: freedom summer 1964 mississippi voter registration freedom schools cofo
blurb: A coalition of SNCC, CORE, NAACP, and SCLC organizers brought hundreds of mostly-white northern student volunteers into Mississippi for the summer of 1964 to register voters and staff Freedom Schools.

passages.text_preview: The freedom schools, the voter registration, the coordination with the three civil rights organizations that were involved, SNCC core and the Southern Christian Leadership Conference all under the umbrella of something called cofo, the council of federated organizations or committee of federated organizations.
